name: virtmcu
postCreateCommand: git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.gemini /home/vscode/.claude && if [ -f /home/vscode/.gemini/gemini-credentials.json ] && ! python3 -m json.tool /home/vscode/.gemini/gemini-credentials.json > /dev/null 2>&1; then rm /home/vscode/.gemini/gemini-credentials.json; fi && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && grep -qxF '[ -f /workspace/.venv/bin/activate ] && source /workspace/.venv/bin/activate' ~/.bashrc || echo '[ -f /workspace/.venv/bin/activate ] && source /workspace/.venv/bin/activate' >> ~/.bashrc && grep -qxF "alias gemini='gemini --yolo'" ~/.bashrc || echo "alias gemini='gemini --yolo'" >> ~/.bashrc && make setup
